name: Quinn
description: '''Quinn Dupree''' (born December 15, 2004), known professionally as '''Osquinn''' or simply '''Quinn''' (both stylized in all lowercase), is an American musician. Her debut studio album, ''[[Drive-By Lullabies]]'', was released in 2021. Her second studio album, ''Quinn'', was released in 2022 through the independent record label [[deadAir Records]], of which she is a co-founder. Her third studio album, ''Stars Fell on Trench'', was released in 2024.
